hero.tagline: No templates. No off-the-shelf. I design and build digital tools that fit precisely how your business works.

services.label: What I build
services.title: Solutions shaped around your use case
services.subtitle: Every solution starts with a thorough understanding of what you need, not what is easiest to build.
services.web_desc: Websites built around your message and your customers. Not a theme filled with generic content.
services.software_desc: Tools that reflect exactly how your team works. Not a generic app you have to adapt yourself to.
services.saas_desc: Have an idea that requires users to sign up, pay, and use your product? I build the whole platform.
services.pwa_desc: Web apps that work like a real app on the phone. No app store, no installation required.
services.fullstack_desc: From database to user interface. You do not need to coordinate between frontend, backend, and ops people.
services.consulting_desc: Unsure how you should build something? I help you make the right technical choices early.

projects.label: Own projects
projects.title: Built from scratch
projects.subtitle: Solutions I have designed, built, and launched myself, from idea to finished product.
projects.losttags_desc: LostTags came about because existing solutions were too generic. The platform lets you create custom QR labels tailored to what you are labelling, with automatic notification to the owner if something is lost.
projects.losttags_f1: Custom QR labels with optional design
projects.losttags_f2: Automatic notifications via SMS and email
projects.inventoriz_desc: Inventoriz was built because small teams pay for way too much functionality they do not need. The result is a clear system that makes it easy to keep track of what you have and where it is.
projects.inventoriz_f1: QR scanning directly in the browser
projects.inventoriz_f3: Works offline as an installed app

about.label: About me
about.title: Thorleif Jacobsen
about.body1: I build digital solutions that are tailored to the use case, not the other way around. That means I spend time understanding what you actually need before writing a single line of code.
about.body2: I have built and launched my own products, and know what it takes to carry an idea all the way through. I bring that experience into every project.
about.val1_desc: A template can look good, but it was never made for you. I always start with your problem.
about.val2_desc: You get one person who knows the whole solution, not a team where no one owns the full picture.
about.val3_desc: The best solution is the one people actually use. I build for real use, not impressive demos.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Let us talk about what you need
contact.subtitle: Tell me a bit about what you want to build or what is not working as it should. We take it from there.
contact.name: Name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.message_placeholder: Describe what you need or what you want to achieve...
contact.sent_sub: I will get back to you as soon as possible.
